notes: stock Git creates a v2 bundle with empty stdout/stderr and a verifiable bundle payload
stock Git creates a v3 bundle with object-format header and a verifiable bundle payload
stock Git treats bundle version -1 as its default v2 bundle sentinel
stock Git rejects unsupported numeric bundle version 1 with exit 128 and no bundle side effect
stock Git rejects unsupported numeric bundle version 4 with exit 128 and no bundle side effect
stock Git accepts k/m/g integer suffix parsing, then rejects expanded bundle version 1024 with exit 128
stock Git rejects non-numeric bundle version values with option parser stderr and exit 129
stock Git rejects empty bundle version values with numerical-value parser stderr and exit 129
